dimensions.label: Model recommendations
dimensions.description: Recommendations surfaced to operators with context, priority, and expected outcome.

dimensions.label: Model outputs
dimensions.description: Scores, rankings, allocations, and confidence bands delivered by the system.

dimensions.label: Human review
dimensions.description: Review queues, approval paths, and time-to-decision for human-in-the-loop workflows.

dimensions.label: Overrides
dimensions.description: Manual changes, policy exceptions, and corrections applied against model guidance.

dimensions.label: Adoption rate
dimensions.description: Share of recommendations accepted, deferred, or rejected over time.

dimensions.label: Performance rate
dimensions.description: Operational success of adopted actions against targets and service levels.

dimensions.label: Optimization outcomes
dimensions.description: Results from executed optimizations — efficiency, throughput, and constraint satisfaction.

dimensions.label: Exception detection
dimensions.description: Out-of-policy cases, stale inputs, and operational alerts requiring attention.

dimensions.label: Action tracking
dimensions.description: Decisions taken, workflows triggered, and downstream system responses.

dimensions.label: Estimated value opportunity
dimensions.description: Projected lift from pending or partially adopted recommendations.

dimensions.label: Cumulative business impact
dimensions.description: Attributed revenue, cost, and service-level outcomes realized over time.

dimensions.label: Model improvement over time
dimensions.description: Learning loops from overrides, exceptions, and outcome feedback into model refinement.
